decisions.decision: 13-02 executed in isolated worktree by gsd-executor, then cherry-picked (af401f6..worktree branch) onto moved HEAD instead of merging
decisions.rationale: Codex committed 306eedd/656a307 to the branch mid-run; zero file overlap with 13-02 (network/* vs green-room/*), cherry-pick keeps history linear

decisions.decision: 13-02 added /api/network/blocks (block/unblock) even though 13-03 nominally owns it
decisions.rationale: Task 2 acceptance criterion 'Block/unblock uses inline confirmation' cannot be UI-only per the non-negotiable safety rules; scoped to session-client INSERT/DELETE on existing blocks table under existing RLS. 13-03 must build on it, not duplicate it

decisions.decision: 13-02 omitted 'Remove connection' action from UI despite UI-SPEC listing it
decisions.rationale: No RLS transition exists from accepted to a terminal state; adding one is a schema change out of 13-02 scope

decisions.decision: Following/followers tabs exclude accepted connections (relationship-priority rule)
decisions.rationale: Matches lib/green-room/discover.ts precedent; mutual connections should not double-render as follow noise
